tools.name: parse_fix_message
tools.description: Use this tool whenever you see one raw FIX message string, typically starting with 8=FIX. The input may use pipe (|) or SOH separators. By default it returns only the human-readable hierarchical output. Set type=tags to return only the hierarchical FIX field/tag view.

tools.name: parse_fix_messages
tools.description: Use this tool whenever you see multiple raw FIX messages that need to be parsed in order. Each message typically starts with 8=FIX and may use pipe (|) or SOH separators. Returns ordered Onikora UFO, FFO, and optional sequence output.

tools.name: get_initiator_recipe
tools.description: Returns the recommended Fixie initiator pattern for market_data, order_entry, or quote_request.

tools.name: get_runtime_config_template
tools.description: Returns a JSON runtime configuration template for a Fixie initiator.

tools.name: generate_initiator_source
tools.description: Generates generic Java source for a managed or standalone Fixie initiator.

tools.name: generate_runtime_config
tools.description: Generates a runtime configuration entry for a Fixie initiator.

tools.name: validate_initiator_spec
tools.description: Checks whether the initiator request has enough information to generate useful Fixie code.
